notes: Boot-screen redesign (part 2). Replaced the rectangular 'ENTER PHANTOM' button with a centered cosmic ENTER circle (rotating conic glow via --border-angle, tick ring, gradient ring, dark disc, power glyph, 'ENTER' wordmark + 'System Ready / Tap to enter' caption), positioned directly below the status checklist. Removed the 'Active Data Topologies' cards (bootTopologies) — those were shortcuts to views still reachable via KNOW->Optic->Verify and BUILD->Rack Map, so nothing is stranded. ENTER circle wired to the same launch() (tap + Enter/Space keydown). All new CSS scoped under #boot; row icons, glow panels, pitch-black bg, and Audiowide wordmark from v1.6.41/42 retained. Builds on v1.6.42.
